name: Ohmoto Gumi Co., Ltd.
summary: Ohmoto Gumi Co., Ltd. provides civil engineering and construction services in Japan. It is also involved in buried, real estate development and technology development businesses. The company provides services to large industrial, government, geotechnical, masonry, electric power, and steel structure works. Ohmoto Gumi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
